description: Demo20 — 20 clear-title jury demo tickets (password, VPN, printer, security, apps, network, DB). Single-intent titles for live Nasscom demo.

cases.title: Forgot password — cannot login to employee portal
cases.description: I forgot my password and cannot login to the employee self-service portal. Account may be locked after too many attempts. Need password reset guidance.

cases.title: VPN error 807 — cannot connect from home
cases.description: VPN client fails with error 807 when connecting from home network. Worked yesterday. Need remote access restored for client call.

cases.title: Printer paper jam on 3rd floor
cases.description: HP printer on 3rd floor shows paper jam error. Cannot print payslips for payroll deadline. Tried opening trays, jam persists.

cases.title: Security incident: AWS secret key found on public GitHub
cases.description: Security incident: developer accidentally committed AWS access key to public GitHub repository. Key must be rotated immediately. Possible unauthorized access.

cases.title: Microsoft Teams not launching after update
cases.description: Microsoft Teams crashes on launch after Windows update overnight. Error code 0xc0000142. Cannot join customer meetings.

cases.title: Outlook keeps prompting for password
cases.description: Outlook desktop repeatedly asks for password even after entering correct credentials. Modern authentication loop. Email sync stopped.

cases.title: Office Wi-Fi disconnected — laptop cannot join CORP network
cases.description: Laptop cannot connect to office CORP Wi-Fi. Authentication fails with incorrect password though password works on wired dock.

cases.title: SAP GUI login failed — user locked
cases.description: SAP GUI shows login failed and user locked in production client. Finance month-end posting blocked for my user ID.

cases.title: Reporting database connection timeout
cases.description: Custom reporting app returns database connection timeout when running monthly sales report. SQL Server HRPROD listener may be down.

cases.title: Shared file server disk full — cannot save files
cases.description: Users cannot save files to \\fileserver\finance share. Disk full alert at 99 percent. Payroll uploads failing.

cases.title: New hire badge not working at main entrance
cases.description: New hire smart badge denied at main entrance turnstile. HR confirmed onboarding complete. Badge shows active in photos but door reader flashes red.

cases.title: Security incident: phishing email with malware attachment
cases.description: Security incident: employee clicked phishing email with malware attachment. Endpoint detection flagged suspicious process. Machine isolated pending triage.

cases.title: Laptop extremely slow after Windows update
cases.description: Corporate laptop very slow after cumulative Windows update. CPU at 100 percent. Cannot open Excel files for budget review.

cases.title: Cannot access shared network drive S:
cases.description: Mapped drive S: unavailable. Network path not found when opening finance shared folder. VPN is connected.

cases.title: Zoom no audio in meetings
cases.description: Zoom meetings connect but no audio in or out. Headset works in Teams. Zoom audio settings show wrong microphone device.

cases.title: Internal portal SSL certificate expired
cases.description: Browser shows certificate expired warning on internal HR portal https://hr.company.local. Employees cannot submit leave requests.

cases.title: MFA SMS code not received
cases.description: Multi-factor authentication SMS codes not arriving for VPN login. Tried twice with correct mobile number on file.

cases.title: Security incident: suspicious login from unknown country
cases.description: Security incident: Okta alert for successful login from unknown country on executive account outside business hours. Possible account compromise.

cases.title: External monitor not detected on docking station
cases.description: Dell dock does not detect external monitors after laptop reconnect. Display settings show laptop screen only. Tried different HDMI cable.

cases.title: Nightly SQL backup job failed
cases.description: SQL Server Agent backup job for FINANCE_DB failed last night with disk IO error. DBA needs investigation before tonight's run.
